name: leetcode-anki
description: Spaced-repetition practice for LeetCode — Anki, but the cards are problems.

scripts.package: node --test && mkdir -p builds && zip -r builds/leetcode-anki-$npm_package_version.zip manifest.json background.js content lib popup icons/icon16.png icons/icon32.png icons/icon48.png icons/icon128.png
